name: Obby: IQ Escape from the Laboratory
description: Welcome to “Obby: IQ Escape from the Laboratory” - a unique 3D game where each level tests not only your dexterity, but also your intelligence! You find yourself in a mysterious laboratory full of puzzles, traps and unusual challenges. To get out, youll have to do more than just jump - youll have to think! What awaits you: IQ-tests - non-standard tasks that require logic, attention and wit. Fun mechanics - push, build, jump and destroy: each level offers a new approach to the solution. Humor and surprises - unexpected traps and funny situations are waiting around every corner. Parkour with brain - its not just an obby, its
instructions: Control on your phone - Move - virtual joystick on the left hand side - Jump - button on the right - Interaction if needed - additional button
